articles.title: Jairam Ramesh hails Siddaramaiah as influential leader in Karnataka
articles.description: Congress's Jairam Ramesh hailed outgoing Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah as a dominant figure, praising his four-decade career and dignified handling of the leadership transition. DK Shivakumar is expected to be elected as the new Chief Minister.

articles.title: Kharge meets outgoing Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah, praises his service
articles.description: Mallikarjun Kharge praised outgoing Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah's service. Siddaramaiah met party leadership in Delhi amid talks of a cabinet reshuffle. DK Shivakumar is expected to be named the new CM in a planned leadership change.

articles.title: 'Traumatic, Can't Disappoint Students': Supreme Court Raps NTA In NEET Paper Leak Case
articles.description: The Supreme Court criticised the NTA over the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak case, calling the situation “traumatic” and warning that students and families “cannot be disappointed”.

articles.title: Amit Shah begins visit to areas along the international border in Gujarat
articles.description: Amit Shah visits Gujarat's international border to review security and engage with local officials and BSF officers.

articles.title: Ram Madhav writes: Should converted tribals retain reservation benefits? The debate is on
articles.description: Current demand rests on the Kartik Oraon’s Joint Parliamentary Committee and Lokur Committee reports, besides SC observations, insisting on identifying STs as those with a traditional faith, culture, customs, rituals, and practices. Those converting to other religions abandon most of these and hence should be de-listed, the argument goes

articles.title: Quote of the day by Anne Frank: 'You can be lonely even when you are loved by many people, since you are still not anybody’s ‘one and only.’' - What The Diary of a Young Girl author teaches us about loneliness and emotional connection
articles.description: Anne Frank's words on loneliness remain relevant today. She wrote about feeling unseen despite affection. This feeling persists even with modern connections. Her diary, reveals a deep human need for singular understanding. This insight continues to connect with readers across generations. It emphasises emotional depth over popularity. Read on!

articles.title: "Highly Inaccurate": Sheikh Hasina On UN Report On Bangladesh Protest Death Count
articles.description: The OHCHR published its report on Bangladesh protests in February last year

articles.title: ‘Won’t Be Easy Against Turks’: Israeli-US Spy Predicts Future Conflicts Involving Turkey & Egypt
articles.description: Former Israeli-American spy Jonathan Pollard sparked controversy after claiming Israel must prepare for future wars beyond Iran. Speaking on an Arutz Sheva podcast, Pollard suggested Turkey and Egypt could become the next major conflict fronts and warned “the storm is coming.” His remarks arrive amid worsening Israel-Turkey tensions over Gaza and regional security concerns involving Syria. Despite long-standing diplomatic ties and peace agreements, relations between Israel, Turkey and Egypt have faced growing strain. #JonathanPollard #Israel #Turkey #Egypt #MiddleEast #Iran #Gaza #BreakingNews #Geopolitics #IsraelTurkey

articles.title: Pakistan’s Abraham Accords dilemma: Why Asim Munir and Shehbaz Sharif could soon be in Saudi Arabia
articles.description: As Saudi Arabia weighs its next move, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir are expected to engage Riyadh, which Pakistan sees as crucial to any future decision on the issue.

articles.title: 'Pillar Of Strength': DK Shivakumar Pens Heartfelt Message For Outgoing Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah
articles.description: DK Shivakumar hails Siddaramaiah after his resignation as Karnataka chief minister, praising his decades long journey, welfare schemes, and support in strengthening Congress

articles.title: PM Modi's 'extreme moral cowardice' for standing as Israel's strongest supporter: Congress
articles.description: Modi's Stance: Congress condemns PM Modi's support for Israel, calling it a betrayal of India's values.

articles.title: A new political chapter for EPS? AIADMK chief moves out of Greenways Road bungalow after 15 years
articles.description: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami has moved from his 15-year official residence on Greenways Road to a new independent house in Royapettah, near the party headquarters. This relocation occurs amidst internal party turmoil following a recent electoral defeat and challenges to his leadership from within the AIADMK ranks.

Congress To Hold CLP Meeting Tomorrow, Shivakumar Likely To Succeed Siddaramaiah

articles.title: Coffee Day shares hit 20% upper circuit as Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah resigns: Here's why
articles.description: Shivakumar is deeply connected to the CCD family through matrimonial alliance as his eldest daughter, Aisshwarya, is married to Amartya Hegde, the son of the late CCD founder VG Siddhartha

articles.title: Siddaramaiah’s Exit May Haunt DK Shivakumar & Rahul Gandhi As Karnataka Caste Census Row Explodes
articles.description: Siddaramaiah’s decision to formally accept Karnataka’s caste census report just before resigning as Chief Minister has triggered intense political debate. The move is being seen as a calculated final message to both his likely successor DK Shivakumar and Congress leader Rahul Gandhi.The caste survey, pending for years because of its politically sensitive findings, reportedly highlights the growing demographic strength of OBCs, minorities, and Dalits under Siddaramaiah’s AHINDA political framework. But the report also threatens to reopen Karnataka’s delicate caste equations involving Lingayats and Vokkaligas.For DK Shivakumar, the caste census could become a major political challenge. For Rahul Gandhi, it has become a credibility test for the Congress party’s national caste census campaign.

articles.title: Delhi HC seeks response from Centre, X over Cockroach Janta Party's handle being withheld
articles.description: The Delhi High Court has issued notices to the Union government and X regarding the blocking of the Cockroach Janta Party's account. The satirical outfit's founder challenged the action, alleging it was based on national security grounds and raising concerns about online censorship and free speech.

articles.title: HR offered a 100% hike to candidate willing to accept lower pay; speechless, he learns it wasn’t just about him being the ‘strongest candidate’
articles.description: A viral X post about a job interview is sparking conversations around toxic workplaces, salary negotiations, and ethical hiring practices. The story follows a candidate who agreed to take a lower salary just to escape a bad work environment, only to be surprised with a much higher offer from the interviewer.

articles.title: Supreme Court refuses to interfere with anticipatory bail to Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati in POCSO case
articles.description: The Supreme Court has declined to intervene in the Allahabad High Court's decision to grant anticipatory bail to Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati in the case involving allegations under the POCSO Act. The High Court had previously granted bail to the Swami and his disciple. Both parties were directed to cooperate with the investigation and refrain from media statements.

articles.title: Trump's Iran Dilemma: Two Reasons Why US President Is Dragging His Feet On Peace Deal
articles.description: The ceasefire extension has exposed a deeper dilemma for Trump: how to pursue de-escalation with Iran without looking politically weak or surrendering strategic leverage

articles.title: Terror, Pakistan, Hormuz And UNSC: NSA Ajit Doval Shares Blunt Message To The World From Russia
articles.description: India’s NSA Ajit Doval delivered one of his toughest global security speeches yet at the first international security forum in Moscow. From Pakistan-sponsored terrorism to the Iran war, Hormuz blockade fears and the growing irrelevance of the United Nations, Doval fired warnings at multiple fronts simultaneously. He slammed double standards on terrorism, warned against using terror as state policy and questioned whether outdated global institutions can still handle modern crises. Doval also highlighted the massive risks of a wider Iran conflict and disruption in the Strait of Hormuz, through which nearly one-fifth of the world’s oil passes. The speech signalled a sharper, more assertive India willing to openly challenge Pakistan, question the UNSC structure and defend its strategic interests in an increasingly unstable world order. Moscow became the stage for India’s strongest security message yet on terrorism, global instability and geopolitical hypocrisy.

articles.title: Why Is the Trump Administration Investigating LinkedIn Co-Founder Reid Hoffman's Nonprofit?
articles.description: The Department of Justice is investigating Reid Hoffman's nonprofit, American Future Republic, due to its financial contributions that supported E. Jean Carroll's legal case against Trump. Hoffman has long been a major financial backer of the Democratic Party and its causes, donating millions over the years.

articles.title: NCB places habitual narcotics offender in prevention detention to curb drug-trafficking
articles.description: Referred to informally as a “scientist” by his peers in a nod to his technical prowess, Rahul Shedge, a post-graduate in organic chemistry, is allegedly adept at setting up facilities for the manufacturing of illicit drugs and allied chemicals.

articles.title: HC penalises man for harassing elderly mother through persistent litigation
articles.description: The Bombay High Court upheld a ruling favoring a mother over her son, imposing ₹50,000 in costs for his harassment during her twilight years.

articles.title: Supreme Court directs states, UTs to adopt a uniform trauma care policy
articles.description: The Supreme Court mandates a uniform trauma care policy nationwide, including a common helpline and protections for Good Samaritans, to improve emergency response.

articles.title: 'Aliens Walk Among Us': Trump White House Launches UFO-Style Immigration Tracker Website
articles.description: The Trump administration launched Aliens.gov, a UFO-themed immigration enforcement website tracking ICE arrests and migrant encounters nationwide. The site claims “aliens” are already living among Americans and encourages users to report “suspicious aliens” through an ICE tip line.

articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Trinamool Congress MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar on Thursday accused fellow party MP Kalyan Banerjee of \"verbally abusing\" her inside Lok Sabha .

articles.title: Supreme Court grants divorce even as wife wanted adultery proven first
articles.description: The Supreme Court has dissolved a marriage despite the wife opposing divorce, not because she wanted to save the relationship, but because she first wanted to prove in court that her husband committed adultery.

articles.title: Helen Mirren called 'evil Zionist b****' in viral clip on night out with husband Taylor Hackford - WATCH
articles.description: Veteran actress Helen Mirren faced a viral social media incident where a Pro-Palestine protestor verbally accosted her and her husband, filmmaker Taylor Hackford, on a London street. The man, filming the couple, hurled accusations regarding Mirren's pro-Israel stance, referencing comments she made while promoting her film 'Golda'. The incident is reportedly being investigated as a potential hate crime.

articles.title: New Yorkers finally fed up with Mamdani
articles.description: A rally this week outside Gracie Mansion, the mayor's residence in New York City, highlights Mayor Zohran Mamdani's antisemitism problem: He doesn't think antisemitism is a problem.

articles.title: Cyprus’s desire to buy BrahMos, Kamikaze drones from India alarms Turkey
articles.description: Cyprus is seeking to acquire BrahMos cruise missiles and kamikaze drones from India, a move that has alarmed Türkiye. This potential defense deal, possibly part of an EU program, could significantly alter the regional military balance in the Eastern Mediterranean. The acquisition follows a roadmap for bilateral defense cooperation between India and Cyprus.

articles.description: Hezbollah's increasing deployment of fibre-optic drones along the Israel-Lebanon border is significantly altering the conflict dynamics, posing severe threats to Israeli military and civilian populations.

articles.description: Iran stated it is working to build a global order rejecting US "hegemony." A top official at a Moscow security forum also stressed that the strategic Strait of Hormuz cannot be allowed to become a source of insecurity for the country.
